subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter dated the eleventh of July and two telegrams from thee were received [3.5s]... ...These issues (violations of the Covenant) are like the froth of the sea – they come and then disappear...But if a person does some injury to me, myself, not to the Cause of God, even if he cuts off one of my limbs
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مورخ یازدهم جولای رسید و دو تلغراف از شما رسید یکی ... این مسائل مثل کف دریا است
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
